title: thlaspi huetii
intro: Thlaspi huetii, also known as Huet's penny cress or Huet's orlaya, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Thlaspi huetii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Thlaspi huetii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
